precondition: Voice Interaction v2.1 documentation is reviewed
action: Read the spec and QA scenarios
expected: The implementation includes the Voice v2 state model, confirm-send default, opt-in Direct Conversation Mode, compact state UI, Conversation state panel, TTS interruption, and speaking / listening mutual exclusion.

precondition: A fresh or legacy settings response is loaded
action: Inspect Voice workspace Conversation mode and Home / Chat voice status
expected: Voice interaction mode defaults to 确认后发送. ASR transcript waits for user confirmation and can be edited or cleared before sending.

precondition: Voice workspace Conversation tab is open
action: User clicks 直接对话
expected: Direct Conversation Mode is explicitly enabled, persisted through settings, and shown in Voice workspace plus Home / Chat. It is not implied by enabling Local ASR or Voice Output.

precondition: Direct Conversation Mode is enabled
action: Do nothing after assistant reply completes
expected: The app does not begin listening automatically. Each round still requires an explicit user click or push-to-talk action.

precondition: Direct Conversation Mode is enabled and Web Speech returns a final transcript
action: Complete a user-triggered Web Speech recording
expected: The transcript is sent through the existing chat endpoint without requiring a second send click.

precondition: Direct Conversation Mode is enabled and Local ASR returns a transcript
action: Complete a user-triggered Local ASR recording
expected: The transcript is sent through the existing chat endpoint after local transcription succeeds.

precondition: Direct Conversation Mode is enabled and the chat input contains an unsent typed draft
action: A voice transcript is auto-sent
expected: The voice transcript is sent as its own chat turn and the existing typed draft is not overwritten.

precondition: Direct Conversation Mode and Voice Output are enabled
action: Assistant final reply completes after an auto-sent voice transcript
expected: The assistant reply is spoken after completion using renderer-side speechSynthesis. Voice Profile v1 defaults Direct Conversation to brief mode while the full reply remains visible in chat.

precondition: Direct Conversation Mode and Voice Output are enabled, and direct spoken mode is set to full
action: Assistant final reply completes after an auto-sent voice transcript
expected: The sanitized full assistant reply is spoken, the full chat reply remains visible, and events contain only safe mode and count summaries.
forbidden_terms: full assistant reply in Event Stream

precondition: Direct Conversation Mode and Voice Output are enabled, and direct spoken mode is set to silent
action: Assistant final reply completes after an auto-sent voice transcript
expected: The assistant reply remains visible in chat and no speech starts. A safe skipped event records silent_mode.

precondition: Direct Conversation Mode is enabled and Voice Output is disabled
action: Assistant final reply completes after an auto-sent voice transcript
expected: The assistant reply remains text-only and no speech starts.

precondition: A Direct Conversation transcript is auto-sent
action: Inspect Event Stream, Debug, Prompt Preview, Raw JSON, and Overlay
expected: Safe events show lifecycle, provider, mode, character count, sentence count, max limits, and skip reason only. They do not show the full transcript, raw prompt, paths, secrets, full assistant reply, or spoken text.

precondition: Voice state is idle
action: User activates push-to-talk or click-to-record
expected: Recording starts only after a user gesture and shows a visible listening state.

precondition: Voice v2.1 spec is used for implementation planning
action: Check hands-free / auto-listen behavior
expected: Hands-free is documented as future optional behavior and remains off by default.

precondition: Local ASR voice input state is listening
action: User stops recording or recording reaches max duration
expected: Captured audio is sent only to the local backend transcription path.

precondition: Voice state is ready_to_send under confirm-send
action: User confirms send
expected: Confirmed transcript enters the existing chat flow as normal user input.

precondition: Voice state is speaking
action: User starts recording
expected: Active TTS stops before recording begins and the interruption is treated as intentional.

precondition: Voice state is speaking
action: User clicks Stop Voice
expected: Speech stops and Event Stream records only a safe lifecycle summary.

precondition: Voice v2.1 is active
action: Attempt to enter listening while speaking, or speaking while listening
expected: The controller serializes the transition so listening and speaking are never active at the same time.

precondition: Voice Profile v1 brief spoken reply mode is enabled
action: Assistant produces a long strategy answer
expected: Voice speaks only a short safe companion sentence while the fuller answer remains in chat.

precondition: Confirm-send mode is active and ASR has produced a transcript but user has not sent it
action: Inspect Event Stream, Debug, Prompt Preview, Raw JSON, Overlay, memory, and game context
expected: Only safe transcript status or character count is visible; no state write has occurred.

precondition: Local ASR is not configured
action: User attempts a Local ASR transcription path
expected: UI shows 本地语音识别未配置 and does not start transcription.

precondition: User denies microphone permission
action: User starts recording
expected: UI shows 麦克风权限被拒绝 and does not retry automatically.

precondition: Local ASR does not complete within timeout
action: Transcription times out
expected: UI suggests a smaller model or shorter recording and cleans temporary audio.

precondition: Voice Output is enabled but system TTS cannot start
action: Assistant final reply completes
expected: UI falls back to text and shows a short speech playback error.
forbidden_terms: full assistant reply in Event Stream

precondition: A confirmed or direct voice transcript enters assistant_thinking
action: Provider request times out
expected: UI shows a friendly timeout message without replaying or re-sending automatically.

precondition: Home / Chat is visible
action: Move through confirm-send and Direct Conversation voice states
expected: The chat input area shows compact, Chinese-first state and current mode while keeping normal text input usable.

precondition: Voice workspace is open
action: Open the Conversation tab
expected: Conversation tab shows state, 确认后发送 / 直接对话 mode switch, input mode, send policy, output policy, transcript confirmation, interruption, and safe errors.

precondition: Voice workspace Output tab is open
action: Inspect Voice Output copy
expected: Output tab explains that Direct Conversation replies are spoken only when Voice Output is enabled and remain text-only when disabled.

precondition: A later Overlay task chooses to show Voice state
action: Display Voice state in Overlay
expected: Overlay shows only low-risk state such as listening, transcribing, ready to confirm, speaking, interrupted, direct mode enabled, or error.
